rulings.Case Title: SERGIO AZZOLLINI VS. CBS OUTDOOR INC A DELAWARE CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, February 23, 2009, line 9, PLAINTIFF SERGIO AZZOLLINI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Court strikes defendant's amended opposition and Hicks reply declaration as untimely. Court Grants plaintiff's motion for summary judgment. Plaintiff has proven a prima facie case for unlawful detainer and defendant fails to create a triable issue of fact. =(302/CWW/PB)
